overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a rainy night drive through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player follows a teal sports car through elevated highways and a roundabout, then navigates a muddy parking lot with pedestrians before exiting onto a winding road.

agents.ego_description: following the teal sports car along the wet elevated highway, maintaining steady speed through the heavy rain

notable_agents.action: teal sports car driving ahead on the highway, maintaining consistent distance

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens with cyan and pink neon graphics on building facades
metal guardrail with integrated lighting running along the highway edge
steep embankment with sparse trees and shrubs rising beside the highway
tall glass and steel skyscrapers with illuminated windows forming the city backdrop

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night drive along an elevated highway through a futuristic city. Neon billboards glow brightly on the right while the teal target car drives ahead. The wet asphalt reflects the city lights as the vehicle maintains a steady following position.

events.description: vehicle navigates the roundabout curve, following the teal car through the turn

agents.ego_description: navigating the roundabout curve, maintaining visual contact with the teal car ahead

notable_agents.action: teal car taking the roundabout turn, beginning to pull ahead

entered.detail: landscaped circular island with dense palm trees and illuminated edge markers
tall palm trees arranged in a circular pattern on the roundabout island
large corporate billboard with green neon text visible on the left side of the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a large roundabout with a palm-tree-filled central island. The teal car ahead navigates the curve as the city skyline disappears behind. A prominent corporate billboard becomes visible on the left as the turn progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy unpaved parking lot with advertising boards

events.description: vehicle exits paved highway onto muddy unpaved parking lot surface with large potholes
vehicle drives through group of pedestrians standing in the muddy lot, avoiding collision

agents.ego_description: maneuvering slowly through the muddy unpaved parking lot, navigating around pedestrians and potholes

notable_agents.action: person standing in the vehicle path, moving aside at the last moment
person walking away from the vehicle through the muddy ground

entered.detail: unpaved muddy ground with large water-filled potholes and tire tracks
series of illuminated commercial billboards lining the far edge of the lot
stationary red car parked on the muddy ground to the left

segments.scene_description: The vehicle leaves the paved road and enters a muddy, pothole-filled parking lot. Several pedestrians are scattered throughout the area, requiring careful navigation. Illuminated billboards line the perimeter while the roundabout island remains visible in the background. The teal car is no longer in sight.

events.description: vehicle exits muddy lot and re-enters paved asphalt winding road
vehicle accelerates along the wet curving road, leaving the urban area behind

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the winding paved road, navigating the curves as the city gives way to vegetation

entered.detail: curved two-lane road with yellow dividing lines winding through the landscape
silver metal guardrail following the curve of the road
steep hillside covered with dense trees and shrubs
painted yellow curb lining the edge of the roadway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle returns to paved asphalt and accelerates along a winding road leaving the urban area. Metal guardrails line the right side while vegetation-covered hills rise on the left. The heavy rain continues as the drive progresses through the curves, with the city lights now behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from a neon-lit urban highway into a rainy, rural landscape. It begins on an elevated highway where the camera follows a teal sports car past glowing billboards and across wet, reflective asphalt. As the vehicle enters a large roundabout, the city skyline recedes behind a central island of palm trees and a prominent corporate sign. The scene then shifts as the car leaves the pavement for a muddy, pothole-filled parking lot scattered with pedestrians, before the teal car disappears from view. Finally, the vehicle returns to the asphalt and accelerates along a winding road, leaving the city lights behind as metal guardrails and vegetation-covered hills emerge through the heavy rain.
